heading: Tactical Exploitation of National Capabilities Executive Agent
label: 430 Tactical Exploitation of National Capabilities Executive Agent
notes: Amendments2021—Subsec. (b)(1). inserted “and Security” after “for Intelligence”.Pub. L. 116–2832019—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security” for “Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence”.Pub. L. 116–92
amendments: Amendments2021—Subsec. (b)(1). inserted “and Security” after “for Intelligence”.Pub. L. 116–2832019—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security” for “Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence”.Pub. L. 116–92

children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: The Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security shall designate a civilian employee of the Department or a member of the armed forces to serve as the Tactical Exploitation of National Capabilities Executive Agent.
report directly to the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security;

children.label: A
children.text: develop methods to increase warfighter effectiveness through the exploitation of national capabilities; and

children.label: B
children.text: promote cross-domain integration of such capabilities into military operations, training, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance activities.
